detectors.description:
Reentrancy in TrustTehProcess._transfer(address,address,uint256) (TrustTehProcess.sol#417-481):
	External calls:
	- swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance) (TrustTehProcess.sol#463)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (TrustTehProcess.sol#495-507)
	External calls sending eth:
	- sendETHToFee(address(this).balance) (TrustTehProcess.sol#469)
		- _feeAddrWallet.transfer(amount) (TrustTehProcess.sol#545)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount) (TrustTehProcess.sol#479)
		- _rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam) (TrustTehProcess.sol#639)
		- _rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount) (TrustTehProcess.sol#619)
		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount) (TrustTehProcess.sol#621)
	TrustTehProcess._rOwned (TrustTehProcess.sol#219) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- TrustTehProcess._takeTeam(uint256) (TrustTehProcess.sol#633-641)
	- TrustTehProcess._transferStandard(address,address,uint256) (TrustTehProcess.sol#615-629)
	- TrustTehProcess.balanceOf(address) (TrustTehProcess.sol#335-339)
	- TrustTehProcess.constructor() (TrustTehProcess.sol#285-299)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount) (TrustTehProcess.sol#479)
		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) (TrustTehProcess.sol#647)
	TrustTehProcess._rTotal (TrustTehProcess.sol#235) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- TrustTehProcess._getCurrentSupply() (TrustTehProcess.sol#739-749)
	- TrustTehProcess._reflectFee(uint256,uint256) (TrustTehProcess.sol#645-651)
	- TrustTehProcess.constructor() (TrustTehProcess.sol#285-299)
	- TrustTehProcess.tokenFromReflection(uint256) (TrustTehProcess.sol#391-399)
